subject: You've won a prize! Claim now
body: Congratulations! You have been selected as a winner. Click here to claim your reward.

subject: URGENT: Account Security Alert
body: Your account has been compromised. Click here to verify your credentials immediately or lose access.

subject: Meeting Request: Project Review
body: Hi, I would like to schedule a project review meeting to discuss the current progress.

subject: Q3 Budget Proposal - Decision Needed
body: Please choose between the following budget options: Option A (conservative) or Option B (aggressive growth). We need your decision by Friday.

subject: Quick Question: Report Delivery
body: Hi, did you receive the quarterly report I sent yesterday? Please confirm receipt when you get a chance.

subject: Server Maintenance Completed
body: This is to notify you that the scheduled server maintenance has been completed. All systems are now operational.

subject: Monthly Newsletter - May 2026
body: Here is your monthly newsletter with the latest company news and industry updates.

subject: Team Building Event Invitation
body: You are invited to our upcoming team building event. Please confirm your attendance at your earliest convenience.
